key_points: Peat’s combine performance was below expectations, raising questions about his draft stock.
He remains eligible to return to Arizona for another collegiate season.
Scouts note his All‑Big 12 pedigree but cite the need for more development.

articles.title: Why Trading Joel Embiid Would Be Difficult for New 76ers Management
articles.original_title: Why Joel Embiid would be 'tricky to trade' for new 76ers management, even if they want a fresh start

key_points: Embiid’s recurring injuries limit his availability, complicating trade value.
He remains a cornerstone of the 76ers’ on‑court identity and fan appeal.
Management must balance a fresh start with the risk of losing a franchise talent.

articles.title: LeBron James' Future With Lakers Uncertain After $37 Million California Investment

The article highlights his property purchases but does not provide new details about contract negotiations.
key_points: LeBron has spent about $37 million on homes and land across California.
